column1: # Each row defines one benchmarking run.
#   run_id          unique short name; becomes the output directory
#   reference       absolute path to the reference .fa or .fa.gz
#   samples_table   absolute path to the samples.tsv for this species/population
#   mapping_tool    bwamem | bwamem2 | bwaaln | bowtie2 | ngm
#                   - "default" for haplotypecaller, deepvariant, freebayes (mode is N/A)
#                   - "combined_hwe" = combined + per-population HWE prior (wiring still TODO;
#                                       launcher currently treats this as plain "combined")
#   bams_from       empty for anchor rows (do their own trim/map/dedup).
#                   set to an anchor's run_id to reuse that anchor's BAMs (skip trim/map/dedup).
# Anchor convention: one _bcftools_cohort row per (species, aligner). The anchor runs the
# full pipeline including bcftools combined calling, then writes mappings.tsv. The other
# four caller variants in each group reuse the anchor's BAMs.
# Matrix: 5 species  x  2 aligners (ngm, bwamem)  x  5 caller variants  =  50 runs.
